case_title: NAKHIMOVSKY, TATYANA et al VS HANNOLD, DAVID C/O SANITARY FILL CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAKHIMOVSKY, TATYANA NAKHIMOVSKY, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANNOLD, DAVID C/O SANITARY FILL CO. $1,976.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,991.00, ATTORNEY'S FEES NOT ALLOWED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
